_note: Copy to ~/.pi/agent/router-config.json and set 'medium' and 'complex' to model IDs that exist in your models.json. _prefixed keys are ignored by the router.
_list_a_us_eu: medium: phi4:14b  |  complex: mac-mini/phi4:14b (dotnet) or mac-mini/qwen3-coder:30b
_mac_mini_note: When Mac Mini is available, set complex to mac-mini/<model> to route heavy tasks off-device. For .NET use mac-mini/phi4:14b; for Python/PHP/Rust use mac-mini/qwen3-coder:30b.
